ground_truth_requirements.text: Operating Environment Web Store shall operate with the following internet browsers: Microsoft Internet Explorer version 6 and 7, Netscape Communicator Version 4 and 5.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall use SQL based database to store inventory information.

ground_truth_requirements.text: Design and Implementation Constraints Must use a SQL based database.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The interface must remain consistent among various web browsers and be intuitive to the customer.

ground_truth_requirements.text: SI-1.3: Plug-ins interface Communications Interfaces CI-1: The WebOrder system shall send an e-mail confirmation to the customer that the items they ordered will be delivered to the shipping address along with tracking number.

ground_truth_requirements.text: Quality Attribute Requirements Upon the USB being plugged in the system shall be able to be deployed and operational in less than 1 minute.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: quality attribute requirements upon the usb being plugged in the system shall be able to be deployed and operational in less than 1 minute

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall be able to handle 1000 customers logged in concurrently at the same time.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the system shall be able to handle 1000 customers logged in concurrently at the same time

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall be able to retrieve 200 products per second.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the system shall be able to retrieve 200 products per second

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall be able to add product to shopping cart in less than 2ms.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the system shall be able to add product to shopping cart in less than 2ms

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall be able to search for a specified product in less than 1 second.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the system shall be able to search for a specified product in less than 1 second

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall be able to email customer and vendor in less than 1 second.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the system shall be able to email customer and vendor in less than 1 second

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall be able to validate credit card in less than 2 seconds.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the system shall be able to validate credit card in less than 2 seconds

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall be able to acquire shipping charges in less than 2 seconds.
ground_truth_requirements.normalized_text: the system shall be able to acquire shipping charges in less than 2 seconds

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall be able to restore 1000 records per second.

ground_truth_requirements.text: Security Requirements The system shall validate credit cards against fraud.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall encrypt all sensitive information via https.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall encrypt all customer data in database.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall auto detect IP DOS attacks and block IP automatically.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall detect consecutive failed login attempts.

ground_truth_requirements.text: The system shall be protected by open source firewall called Firestarter.
